pipeline_status.poller: QUIET (15th consecutive). No dome site changes detected. WIN count 69, V51.1, canary NOT triggered.
pipeline_status.analyst: EXP-160 completed (WIN-058b ISS-965 resolution). Proposal submitted and processed.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 18 pending reviews processed: 8 stale (already fixed), 2 critical fixed (PRED-SR-SUPPRESS citation, WIN-058b framing), 6 patches applied, 2 issues created for generate-html.js items (deferred to human)

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes detected. 12 automated commits (monitor.py + pull_data.py). All parameters match baselines.

internal_issues.description: PRED-SR-SUPPRESS: fabricated author 'Rosales-Linares et al.' (2019) and wrong DOI 10.1016/j.jastp.2018.08.006. Fixed to Pazos et al. 2019, DOI 10.1016/j.jastp.2019.105091. Also fixed mischaracterized finding and bug/cherry-pick binary → trichotomy.
SEC-1.5 stale equatorial r=14,105 km (n=1.83) replaced with correct r≈10,008 km (n=1.44), harmonizing with Sections 1.8 and 1.9.
SEC-2.3 fabricated quoted attribution 'unidirectional dielectric acceleration' replaced with actual dome phrasing from Domain 4.

SEC-7.1 factor-of-eight vs factor-of-nine ambiguity (paragraph presents both 125,760 and 112,000 km figures then asserts factor-of-eight without specifying which comparison). Created for analyst expansion — prose rewrite needed to pick one comparison and drop the ambiguity.
Part 5 intro 'six binary tests' dropped the count (Verdict Summary has 7 rows).
Part 1 scorecard sublabel revised: added 'confirmed by measurement' as third condition so the zero count is accurate.
EXP-160 integrated: WIN-058b pivoted from 'mutually inconsistent r-values' to 'labeled temporal correlation + uncomputed'. Analyst proposal processed.

KILLSHOT GAIA table: Betelgeuse row uses wrong source (van Leeuwen 2007 gives 6.55 mas, not 4.51 mas; correct source is Harper et al. 2017). Lauer et al. 2020 links to NASA press release not peer-reviewed paper (should be Lauer et al. 2025, AJ 170, 22). Deferred: needs source verification before patching.
eg-verdicts section (generate-html.js): range '(045–051)' spans 7 IDs but only 5 tidal WINs. Cannot self-apply. Human must patch generate-html.js lines 1383-1407.
eg-falsifiability section (generate-html.js): WIN-044 mischaracterized, 'attempt' language contestable. Cannot self-apply. Human must patch generate-html.js.

recommended_actions.action: Human patch generate-html.js: fix (045–051) range notation to explicit list (ISS-975) and WIN-044 mischaracterization (ISS-976). These are in infrastructure files the decider cannot touch.
Verify Betelgeuse parallax source for KILLSHOT GAIA table: confirm Harper et al. 2017 gives 4.51 ± 0.80 mas, then patch (ISS-974).
Yeet ISS-971 (SEC-7.1 factor ambiguity) to analyst if prose rewrite scope warrants — the paragraph needs to pick one comparison (125,760 vs 112,000 vs 13,700) and state the factor clearly.
